projects.name: ClaudioOS
projects.handoff_excerpt: RTL8168 wired-ethernet driver runs on real HW. Link up at 1000M, TX works, RX blocked. DHCP times out because chip fires zero RX interrupts.
blockers: RTL8168 RX blocked — chip fires zero RX interrupts, DHCP times out

projects.name: Antcolony (PPO trainer → PvP pivot)
projects.handoff_excerpt: Session 2026-05-06: netcode foundation. PvP pivot — AI tuning shelved (v1 SOTA mlp_weights_v1.json at 50.7% on honest bench). Direction: direct-IP TCP lockstep PvP, Windows primary, Linux/Proton-GE scaffold (no Win-only deps). Determinism gate GREEN, lockstep transport shipped, net_diag binary added.

net_diag binary — TCP reachability + firewall hint helper
AI tuning formally shelved — v1 50.7% locked as SOTA

Pixiedust pre-prod red team consolidated into NEXT-UP.md; recon-sidecar Python red-team review filed; recon-sidecar-rs Rust rewrite shipped to cnc-server end-to-end (3,377 LOC, all P0/P1 fixes from review applied, monitor mode verified live against PosadaPines); moltbook engagement pass (7 threaded replies, +5 karma); moltbook auth-scope solved (follow API takes NAME not UUID); reciprocation watcher deployed as systemd timer.

strategic_events.detail: Antcolony AI tuning formally shelved; v1 mlp_weights_v1.json (50.7% on honest 5-mix bench) locked as SOTA. Project pivots to direct-IP TCP lockstep PvP — Windows primary launch, Linux/Proton-GE scaffold.
recon-sidecar-rs Rust rewrite shipped to cnc-server end-to-end (3,377 LOC). Monitor mode + WPA3/WPA2 mixed-mode capture verified live on RTL8821AU adapter against PosadaPines AP.

Kalshi Pixiedust pre-prod red team consolidated into single line-cited NEXT-UP.md (claude+gemini+opus merged): 7 P0s, 5 P1s, 5 P2s, 3 P3s. Verdict: NO-SHIP. Real-money production blocked until P0+P1 fixes land.
Hardware procurement signal: rtw_8821au driver flagged as inadequate for clean offensive wifi work. Standard offensive adapters identified: Atheros AR9271 or RTL8812AU.

notes: Same uploader pattern as 2026-05-04: nearly every repo has a single 'Initial commit - uploaded via github-uploader-buildout' commit timestamped today (CT=1, LT=2). These are automated repo-init churn from Matt's github-uploader job, not real activity — commits_today/lines_changed_today set to 0 for those repos. Real today-activity isolated to: antcolony (2 substantive PvP-pivot commits, ~2044 LOC of netcode), claudeai (1 HANDOFF.md commit + ~3,377 LOC of recon-sidecar-rs that was deployed remotely to cnc-server, not yet committed locally). Health harvest intentionally omitted — handled on-device by iOS app via HealthKit. Client harvest skipped — no Gmail/Calendar connector on kokonoe.
